chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5840 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 24-02-2025 Ms. Shahnaz A. Razzaq Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khan Muhammad Bangush Advocate for Respondent No.3 & 4 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that since the matter pertains to encroachment of public property, therefore, the petitioner shall approach the Anti encroachment Tribunal for redressal of grievance in the first instance. In view hereof, petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Amjad PS
